official_policy.headline_description: Headline official baselines come from dev/dev50/test suites.
official_policy.sanity_description: Official dev10/quick runs are sanity checks for harness health.

entries.cli_command: .venv/bin/python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite quick --seed 1337 --repro --max-turns 3 --timeout 180 --worker-num-predict 512 --mentor-num-predict 256 --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --worker-model qwen2.5-coder:7b --mentor-model llama3.1:8b --results-path results/community_quick_signal_qwen25coder7b_llama318b_2026-03-03.json

.venv/bin/python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite quick --seed 1337 --repro --max-turns 3 --timeout 180 --worker-num-predict 512 --mentor-num-predict 256 --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --worker-model qwen2.5-coder:7b --mentor-model deepseek-coder:6.7b --results-path results/community_quick_signal_qwen25coder7b_deepseekcoder67b_2026-03-03.json

.venv/bin/python -m mentor_worker_benchmark run --task-pack task_pack_v2 --suite quick --seed 1337 --max-turns 1 --timeout 90 --worker-num-predict 320 --mentor-num-predict 160 --run-modes worker_only,mentor_worker --worker-model qwen2.5-coder:7b --mentor-model deepseek-coder:6.7b --results-path results/community_quick_matrix_qwen25coder7b_deepseekcoder67b_2026-03-03.json
